content.text:
[cron:investment-research-background-intraday-1030 10:30来福投研会-盘中值班] 执行以下任务：
1. 进入 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace
2. 运行 python3 scripts/run_investment_research_background_cycle.py --cycle intraday
3. 读取 cycle md/json 输出
4. 用中文简短汇报：风险灯号、观察池、是否需要临时会商、周期总览文件路径
5. 若有阻断点，明确写出
Current time: Thursday, April 30th, 2026 - 10:30 AM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-30 02:30 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.
